name: Battlewasp - Rapier the Onslaught
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>猛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のレイピア
name_jp_tl: Bee Force - Rapier the Furious Attack
desc: If you control no face-up monsters, or the only face-up monsters you control are Insect monsters: You can discard 1 other Insect monster; place 1 "Battlewasp Wind" from your Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone, then Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; reduce the Level of 1 Insect monster you control by 1. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Rapier the Onslaught" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no face-up monsters, or the only face-up monsters you control are Insect monsters: You can discard 1 other Insect monster; place 1 "Battlewasp Wind" from your Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone, then Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; reduce the Level of 1 Insect monster you control by 1. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Rapier the Onslaught" once per turn.
eff: If you control no face-up monsters, or the only face-up monsters you control are Insect monsters: You can discard 1 other Insect monster; place 1 "Battlewasp Wind" from your Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone, then Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; reduce the Level of 1 Insect monster you control by 1. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Rapier the Onslaught" once per turn.

action: Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
